name: Mito-Frail MitoQ trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting phase 2 MitoQ registry in frail older adults with vasodilation, mobility, and cognitive-performance endpoints and no posted results.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06027554 as recruiting with 60 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Frail older adults with vasodilation, mobility, and cognitive-performance endpoints
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 60; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
